# Friday Foundry

> Friday Foundry runs live, recurring events that connect emerging creatives with established industry leaders through open, unfiltered conversations.

Friday Foundry brings emerging creatives and industry leaders together for open conversations. Topics are proposed by the next generation and explored in group sessions led by seasoned professionals. Every guest gets one hour of complete carte blanche.

Unlike traditional talks or panels, sessions are built around the questions, challenges, and ambitions of the next generation: we gather what emerging creatives want to discuss, then invite industry leaders with one brief — one hour and complete creative freedom.

## Next event

- Friday Foundry · Cannes Lions 2026 Edition — 24–26 June 2026, Cannes, France.
  Tickets: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/friday-foundry-i-cannes-lions-2026-edition-tickets-1988931451512

## Speakers

- Odile Breffa — Strategy Lead at INNOCEAN Berlin
- Jolyon White — Founder and CCO at 10Days London
- Farah El Feghali — Executive Creative Director, McCann Paris + La Roche-Posay
